title: How I Used Claude Code to Build a $481k App
summary: Austin Marchese shares a case study of building a $481k annual product using Claude Code in 45 days with zero coding experience. He outlines five methodological steps: starting with problem definition and shipping fast, knowing where to engineer versus reuse, learning vocabulary rather than code syntax, taking a deliberate build approach, and identifying failure modes before deployment.
